metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5552
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig 4C shows that reexpression of GFP-VPS26B in VPS26B knock-out neurons the GFP signal overlaps with membrane GluA1 staining, indicating that VPS26B can be localized at (post)synaptic sites.

Fig 2A, C shows colocalization of endogenous VPS26B with somatodendritic early endosome marker EEA1 and recycling endosome markers Syntaxin13 and pulse-chase transferrin.
Fig 2B and Fig S3 confirm these results at the ultrastructural level using immunogold immuno-EM. Experimental description: p-Lenti-C-mGFP VPS26b OriGene Technologies, Inc. Cat#MR204988L4
Form OriGene: Lenti ORF clone of Vps26b (mGFP-tagged) - Mouse vacuolar protein sorting 26 homolog B (yeast) (Vps26b)

Rabbit polyclonal anti-GluA1 C-terminus MilliporeSigma Cat#AB1504; RRID: AB_2113602
Rabbit polyclonal anti-VPS26b Novus Biologicals Cat#NBP1-92575
Rabbit polyclonal anti-Syntaxin13 Synaptic Systems Cat#110 133;
Goat polyclonal anti-EEA1 Santa Cruz Biotechnology, Inc. Cat#sc-6415;
